headlines.title: NASA-Supported Space Tech Advances Earthly Construction
headlines.summary: An innovative 3D printing process that advanced NASA’s approach to outfitting a lunar habitat is making buildings on Earth beautiful, efficient, and strong.  Instead of building structures layer by layer,
